messages.content: Simple high quality background image in regards to plumbers while having good vibrant and contrasting colors with a compelling focal point.

How about a background image with a plumber fixing a leaky faucet? The plumber could be wearing blue overalls and yellow gloves, with a wrench in hand as he's working on the faucet. The background could have a gradient of blue and green colors, representing water and pipes. There could also be some pipes and valves in the background to add to the plumbing theme. The image should have sharp and bright colors to make it visually appealing.
Eye-catching abstract background image with a striking visual based around Electricians while keeping a balance between simplicity and complexity and complementing colors.

How about an abstract background image with an electrician's tool kit? The image could have a mix of bright and bold colors, such as yellow, orange, and blue. The electrician's tool kit could be portrayed as a series of overlapping shapes, with some tools peeping out. The shapes could be in varying shades of the same color to add complexity to the image. There could also be some power plugs, wires, and circuit symbols in the background to further convey the electrician theme. The overall design should be balanced and visually appealing, with a focus on the electrician's tool kit as the focal point.
an icon with visual appeal and clarity  that is both unique and distinctive and has a relevant design compared to competitors while showcasing dogwalkers

How about an icon with a silhouette of a person walking a dog, with the dog's tail forming part of the letter "D" in the word "dogwalker"? This would make the icon both unique and distinctive, while also very clear in its representation of dog walkers. To make it visually appealing, the silhouette could have a stylized and simplified design that emphasizes the curves and fluidity of the person walking the dog. The font used for the word "dogwalker" could be bold and modern, with a contrasting color to make it stand out. This icon design would be unique compared to other dog walker icons and would clearly communicate the concept of dog walking while using a recognizable shape.
an icon with visual appeal and clarity  that is both unique and distinctive and has a relevant design compared to competitors while showcasing dogwalkers
